title: clerodendrum disparifolium
intro: Clerodendrum disparifolium is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae, commonly known as the tropical glorybower or yellow glorybower. This plant has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are thought to be due to the presence of iridoid glycosides and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Clerodendrum disparifolium include its potential use in treating fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues, as well as its ability to act as an antiseptic and antispasmodic. In terms of herbal preparations, Clerodendrum disparifolium can be made into a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
